LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Enclave_Advanced_Power_Armor: A suit of advanced power armor developed by the 英克雷. Offers exceptional protection against all forms of damage, enhanced mobility, and complete environmental sealing. Wearing this armor marks its user as a force to be reckoned with on the battlefield.
The MkII variant of the 英克雷 Advanced Power Armor, featuring improved environmental sealing and enhanced durability for prolonged combat scenarios.
英克雷 Advanced Power Armor MkII
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Enclave_Hellfire_Power_Armor: The Hellfire Power Armor is an advanced 英克雷 suit designed for extreme environments and frontline assault. Its reinforced plating and advanced heat dispersal systems provide unmatched protection against fire and explosions, making its wearer a walking fortress in the most hazardous conditions.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Enclave_X02_Power_Armor.desc: A next-generation 英克雷 power armor, the X-02 offers formidable protection and advanced environmental sealing. It is lighter and more intimidating than earlier models.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Enclave_X02_Tesla_Power_Armo: A rare variant of the X-02, the Tesla Power Armor is fitted with electromagnetic shielding and energy-dispersing coils. It offers superior protection against heat and electrical attacks, making its wearer a terrifying sight on the battlefield.
英克雷 X-02 Tesla Power Armor
